value.found_quote: A [forked subagent](/en/sub-agents#fork-the-current-conversation) is a subagent that inherits your full conversation context instead of starting fresh. It's a way to spawn a subagent, not a separate surface.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes a forked subagent as one that inherits the full conversation context instead of starting fresh, matching the claim. No deprecation or preview status is indicated, so it is treated as active.
